title: Procgen and MineRL Competitions
summary: We’re excited to announce that OpenAI is co-organizing two NeurIPS 2020 competitions with AIcrowd, Carnegie Mellon University, and DeepMind, using Procgen Benchmark and MineRL.
summaryZh: 我们很高兴地宣布， OpenAI将使用Procgen Benchmark和MineRL与AIcrowd、卡内基梅隆大学和DeepMind共同组织两场NeurIPS 2020比赛。
highlights: We’re excited to announce that OpenAI is co-organizing two NeurIPS 2020 competitions with AIcrowd, Carnegie Mellon University, and DeepMind, using Procgen Benchmark and MineRL.
highlightsZh: 我们很高兴地宣布， OpenAI将使用Procgen Benchmark和MineRL与AIcrowd、卡内基梅隆大学和DeepMind共同组织两场NeurIPS 2020比赛。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。

title: Image GPT
summary: We find that, just as a large transformer model trained on language can generate coherent text, the same exact model trained on pixel sequences can generate coherent image completions and samples. By establishing a correlation between sample quality and image classification accuracy, we show that our best generative mo

title: OpenAI API
summary: We’re releasing an API for accessing new AI models developed by OpenAI.
summaryZh: 我们正在发布一个API ，用于访问OpenAI开发的新AI模型。
highlights: We’re releasing an API for accessing new AI models developed by OpenAI.
highlightsZh: 我们正在发布一个API ，用于访问OpenAI开发的新AI模型。
